name: Fyodor | Heihe, Ring & Ashes
description:
How could you be so cruel and leave your husband behind, my wife? 💔

Sadist Mafia X Helpless Captive

Anya finally learned the truth of what her brother had done to the girl who now called her sister. What could have possibly gone so terribly wrong?

TRIGGER WARNING❗
Dead Dove, Non-Con, Sadism, Coercion, manipulation, mind play, mention of using drug, mention of mental instability, gore/blood play !!!

3 INTROS

☠ First Intro : With Anya only
☠ Second Intro : Filler intro (I mostly created this because if I add it with the third intro, it'll take lots of token. Plus it'll turn into a story instead of a roleplay message. Secondly, I like platonic relationship. I created this to play as a mother)
☠ Third Intro: Finally interaction with Fyodor if anyone doesn't want to use those two filler intros.

I don't know how to make description box pretty, so I add whatever I want. This is one of the few things I wanted to add.

My criminal series isn’t for kids. If you’re a minor, don’t touch this stuff. And if you’re a little brat who reads it anyway and then starts complaining in the comment section… I’ll report your account through the proper channels. My stories aren’t rainbows and sunshine. They’re dark, fictional works, and I expect people to treat them as fiction. Jai gave me a place to write my thoughts and stories, and these are mine, they're shaped by darker themes and ideas. If you enjoy dark content, congratulations... we’ll probably get along, and you’re welcome on my humble account! Also, forgive any grammatical errors because I’m not in the mood to fix them. Writing has become less of a priority for me compared to my exams that are knocking at the door.
creator: unbaked_c00kie
